title: Zero Unit Tests Under src/
description: No test files exist inside src/ — 15+ packages (transport, network, protocols, session, presentation, wiring) without any unit tests
impact: Cannot guarantee stability on changes — high regression risk
proposed_solution: Create pytest unit/ structure mirroring src/ layout
evidence: All src/ paths have no test_*.py files

title: Integration Tests Not Runnable
description: Test files in .docs/usage_integration_examples/tests/ import from non-existent packages: from actors.base_actor and from contracts.communication_gateway
impact: Cannot prove L3→L7 works together before production
proposed_solution: Move tests to tests/integration/ and fix import paths after TST-008 is resolved
notes: BaseActor exists only in .docs/usage_integration_examples/ not as importable package

title: No Docker Compose for Integration Tests
description: test_fabric_integration.py requires docker compose up -d but no docker-compose.yml exists anywhere
impact: Integration tests cannot be run locally
proposed_solution: Create docker-compose.yml with FabricService + Redis + httpx tests

title: No pytest Configuration
description: No pytest.ini or pyproject.toml or setup.cfg to define markers and fixtures
impact: Scattered fixtures across files and duplicate MockGateway — no unified markers
proposed_solution: Create pytest.ini with markers (unit, integration, slow) and root conftest.py
evidence: No pytest configuration file in project

title: No Load/Performance Tests
description: No load tests to verify throughput and system saturation points
impact: Cannot identify system limits or bottlenecks before production
proposed_solution: Add k6 or locust scripts with send/receive/stream scenarios

title: No Fault Injection Tests
description: No tests for failure scenarios: network partition, timeout, transporter crash, session expiry
impact: Cannot guarantee behavior under load or failures
proposed_solution: Add fault injection fixtures simulating TransportError, CircuitBreakerOpen, SessionExpired

title: Duplicate MockGateway Implementations
description: MockGateway duplicated in test_actor_isolation.py and conftest.py with different interfaces (should_fail vs raise_on_send)
impact: Modifying MockGateway requires two file changes — inconsistency risk
proposed_solution: Remove MockGateway from test_actor_isolation.py and depend on conftest.py only
evidence: The two fields should_fail and raise_on_send achieve same purpose with different interfaces

title: Missing actors Package — BaseActor Not Importable
description: BaseActor exists only in .docs/usage_integration_examples/base_actor_communication.py not as a package. Import from actors.base_actor fails
impact: All 6 actor isolation tests cannot run — completely broken
proposed_solution: Move BaseActor to src/actors/base_actor.py with __init__.py and fix all import paths
evidence: base_actor_communication.py in .docs/ not in actors/ path

title: No src/__init__.py — src/ Not a Python Package
description: src/ has no __init__.py preventing Python package import
impact: Cannot run from src.xxx... imports without PYTHONPATH manipulation

title: No Dependency File for Test Libraries
description: No requirements.txt or pyproject.toml pinning pytest pytest-asyncio httpx jq or any test libraries
impact: New developers cannot run tests easily — no single pip install
dependencies: New contributors stuck without test setup
evidence: Create requirements-dev.txt or pyproject.toml with all test dependencies pinned
notes: No dependency management file exists anywhere in project

title: No CI/CD Test Pipeline
description: No GitHub Actions or any CI configuration to run tests automatically
impact: Tests never run on commits/PRs — regressions reach production
proposed_solution: Add GitHub Actions workflow running pytest on every push and PR

title: Redundant Test Duplicate: test_live_protocol_switch.py
description: Two similar integration test files exist: tests/test_live_protocol_switch.py and .docs/usage_integration_examples/tests/test_fabric_integration.py testing same scenario
impact: Duplicate maintenance, drift — behavior changes require two file updates
proposed_solution: Merge test_live_protocol_switch.py into test_fabric_integration.py or delete it
evidence: tests/test_live_protocol_switch.py and test_fabric_integration.py both test same live protocol switch scenario

title: No Test Coverage Configuration or Tracking
description: No .coveragerc or coverage.py settings — no way to measure test coverage percentage
impact: No visibility on test quality — coverage gaps undetected
proposed_solution: Add pytest-cov with coverage config in pyproject.toml and minimum threshold

title: No Conftest.py at Project Root
description: Only one conftest.py exists in .docs/usage_integration_examples/tests/ — no root-level conftest.py for shared fixtures
impact: Cannot define shared fixtures and hooks across test tree
proposed_solution: Create root conftest.py with shared fixtures for entire project
evidence: Only one conftest.py in docs path
